title: The World Is Going Agentic — Here's What I've Been Building
notes: Overlap post targeting both Career Pivot (systems thinking, builder credibility) and Agency/SMB (B2B opportunity, purpose-built agents). References OpenClaw by Peter Steinberger (Nov 2025 launch, 247K GitHub stars as of March 2026) and Claude Code agents. Two concrete builds: Telegram news curation bot + goal-tracking agent.
